justification: Joshua Kushner's own announcement post on X naming Thrive Holdings as a permanent capital vehicle he is launching, directly establishing his founder role.
Official Senate press release naming both Heinrich and Portman as co-founders launching the bipartisan Senate Artificial Intelligence Caucus.
TechCrunch article naming Yann LeCun as co-founder and executive chairman of AMI Labs (Advanced Machine Intelligence).
University of Tennessee Q&A page identifying Lynne Parker as founder and director of the AI Tennessee Initiative at UT Knoxville.
FedScoop news article covering the January 2021 White House launch of the National AI Initiative Office with Lynne Parker named as its founding director.
Brown University CS department news item naming Suresh Venkatasubramanian as co-director of ARIA alongside Ellie Pavlick, with NSF funding details.
Official New York State press release from Governor Hochul's office announcing the creation of the Empire AI Consortium as her 2024 State of the State proposal.
Good Ventures' own about page identifies Cari Tuna and Dustin Moskovitz as co-founders of Good Ventures.
Eleos AI's official team page listing Kathleen Finlinson as a co-founder of the organization.
PR Newswire press release naming Brian Long as CEO and co-founder of Adaptive Security alongside Andrew Jones, with funding details from a16z and OpenAI.
Stanford Center for AI Safety's own founding whitepaper authored by Clark Barrett, David Dill, Mykel Kochenderfer, and Dorsa Sadigh, establishing Barrett as a founder.
TechCrunch article documenting Andreessen Horowitz's $25M Series B lead investment in Coinbase, naming the firm as lead investor with Marc Andreessen on the board.
BetaKit article specifically reporting the Government of Canada's CAD$5 million repayable contribution to Element AI.
Business Wire press release for Element AI's $102M Series A, naming DCVC (Data Collective) as the lead investor along with participating investors including Real Ventures.
Wikipedia's Element AI article names Jean-Sébastien Cournoyer of Real Ventures as a co-founder of Element AI, establishing Real Ventures' founding-level role.
